claim_boundary: Sequence approximation of independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry; not binding probability, affinity, experimental competition, blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission evidence.

governance.promotion_gate: global Spearman improves; parent-centered and Top20 non-degrade; parent bootstrap positive fraction >=0.80 and median delta >0

outer_run_closure: result artifact hash closes contract and predictions
contract implementation hash map equals collector freeze implementation map
